OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope defines the set of entity types that the enrichment connector is allowed to process.

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI.

HATCHING_TRIAGE_SANDBOX_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Hatching Triage API.

HATCHING_TRIAGE_SANDBOX_TOKEN.description: API token used to authenticate requests to the Hatching Triage service.

HATCHING_TRIAGE_SANDBOX_USE_EXISTING_ANA.description: If true, retrieves existing analysis results instead of submitting a new one.

HATCHING_TRIAGE_SANDBOX_TAG_COLOR.description: Label color for all other labels.

HATCHING_TRIAGE_SANDBOX_MAX_TLP.description: Traffic Light Protocol (TLP) level to apply on objects imported into OpenCTI.
